---
title: "About"
back-to-top-navigation: false
---

Welcome to the STARR-OMOP Documentation


#### STARR-OMOP v5.4

  - [Getting Access](getting_access.qmd)
  - [Released Datasets](released_datasets.qmd)
  - [Technical Specifications](starr_omop54.qmd)
  - [Changes from OMOP-CDM 5.3 to 5.4](changes_53_to_54.qmd)
  - [FAQ](faq.qmd)

#### STARR-OMOP v5.3 (*Archived*){#53_docs}

  - [Technical Specifications](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wC_ikzVahKUQuGSod4OfFKVPfedAnqO-tDHjo4O2ygY)
  - [User Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dTjCEvvU8sMd8CuaVx94YFoPTsW_xjOMoF9-xl5zHik)
  - [Data Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BW1tRRml5E20ivoA5c8DhfKeuP449cBECkkpKoycwgk)
  - [FAQ](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1_9x2KNKLez5o0-vV4UQU2dp9pn6ezsAEsJXDh7n--3o/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.kbz600iyowv6)
